message:
perf(http): use SmallVec in connection pool cleanup to avoid heap allocs

Replace Vec<PoolKey> and Vec<u64> with SmallVec<[PoolKey; 4]> and
SmallVec<[u64; 8]> in Pool::cleanup_expired(). Most hosts have fewer
than 4 keys and 8 expired connections per cleanup cycle, so the stack
buffer avoids heap allocation in the common case. This is called on
every pool maintenance tick so the cumulative allocation savings matter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
